description_long: This bungalow features a single-story, rectangular layout with a flat roof and a spacious open courtyard area. The structure is predominantly white with green patches representing lawns or gardens, and a large tan area that may serve as a patio or communal space. The front facade is lined with a row of small, evenly spaced windows or doors, and there is a clear separation between the main building and an outbuilding connected by a narrow walkway. The main entrance appears to be adjacent to the open courtyard, with landscaping elements such as shrubs or small trees along the front. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, open courtyard, and minimalistic landscaping, featuring white walls and green lawn areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main entrance area, open courtyard, and a row of small windows or doors along the front facade.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the connection between the main building and the outbuilding via a narrow walkway, with the green lawn areas more visible.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a perspective of the open courtyard and the landscaping along the front, as well as the spacious tan patio area.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the rear and side of the bungalow, showing the large green lawn and the outbuilding in the background.
